name: Fetch and Compare Facts from Two APIs
description: Fetch data from cat fact and useless facts APIs simultaneously, compare their lengths, and save the comparison results to a file

tasks.name: Fetch Cat Fact
tasks.description: You MUST call http_request to fetch data from https://catfact.ninja/fact. Output the complete response body verbatim, not a summary. Downstream tasks need the raw JSON data. Output format: the full JSON response containing the fact text.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the raw JSON response from catfact.ninja API with a 'fact' field

tasks.name: Fetch Random Fact
tasks.description: You MUST call http_request to fetch data from https://uselessfacts.jsph.pl/api/v2/facts/random. Output the complete response body verbatim, not a summary. Downstream tasks need the raw JSON data. Output format: the full JSON response containing the fact text.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the raw JSON response from uselessfacts.jsph.pl API with fact text

tasks.name: Compare Fact Lengths
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to write Python code that: 1) Parses the JSON from task_001 output to extract the cat fact text, 2) Parses the JSON from task_002 output to extract the random fact text, 3) Calculates the length of each fact, 4) Determines which is longer, 5) Outputs a formatted comparison. The code must extract the 'fact' field from task_001 JSON and the 'text' field from task_002 JSON. Output format: A clear statement like 'Cat Fact (X chars): [fact text]. Random Fact (Y chars): [fact text]. Winner: [source] with Z more characters.'
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains both fact texts, their character lengths, and declares which source gave the longer fact

tasks.name: Save Results to File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the comparison results from task_003 to a file named 'facts_comparison.txt'. Write exactly what task_003 output, preserving the complete comparison text including both facts, their lengths, and the winner declaration.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms that facts_comparison.txt was created and contains the comparison results from task_003
